en: If your company is required to comply with New Zealand Statutory Labor Insurance, you will be asked to provide relevant documents in a subsequent form(s).
New Zealand Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment

Is your company required to comply with New Zealand's Accident Compensation Scheme requirements as regulated by Accident Compensation Corporation (ACC) and maintain applicable documentation to show compliance?
Please select from the following reason(s) your company is exempt from compling with New Zealand's Accident Compensation Scheme requirements  requirement
The company is a sole proprietorship with no other employees whose earnings are below the minimum threshold and qualified for reduced levy under CoverPlus Extra or standard CoverPlus.
